spec_natural_language: function initializeAlphaIndices MUST be callable by TraitForgeNft contract (the allowedCaller) when TraitForgeNft calls _incrementGeneration during minting

violated_invariant.precondition: caller is the TraitForgeNft contract (allowedCaller) but not the owner
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: The function should succeed when called by the allowedCaller (TraitForgeNft contract), not just the owner

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly identifies that initializeAlphaIndices uses onlyOwner modifier but should be callable by the allowedCaller (TraitForgeNft contract). The TraitForgeNft contract calls this function via _incrementGeneration but is not the owner, causing the call to fail. The invariant is that the allowedCaller should be able to call this function.
